summary: The AI agent failed to effectively assist the patient in rescheduling their appointment, leading to a disconnection without resolution.

issues.title: Failure to Reschedule Appointment
issues.details: The agent stated it could not help with rescheduling and transferred the patient to support, which is not the expected behavior for an agent designed to handle appointment rescheduling.
issues.expected: The agent should have processed the request to reschedule the appointment and provided available time slots.

issues.title: Incorrect Confirmation of Patient Identity
issues.details: The agent incorrectly assumed the patient's name before confirming their identity, which could lead to privacy issues.
issues.expected: The agent should have waited for the patient to confirm their identity before making assumptions.

issues.title: Ignoring Patient's Urgent Request
issues.details: The agent disconnected the call without addressing the patient's urgent need to reschedule, demonstrating a lack of responsiveness to the patient's request.
issues.expected: The agent should have acknowledged the urgency and continued the conversation to assist the patient.
